title: Las Vegas Heat Wave
lead: Las Vegas is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.89. This anomaly has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Las Vegas has a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.6 GG, indicating extremely high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 11%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 5.5 km/h, providing little relief from the heat. 
 The Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG, confirming that the city is experiencing extremely hot conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
